rationale: The notebook appears to perform a substantive statistical analysis of the Portuguese bank marketing campaign, including the core imbalance problem and conversion patterns. However, the metadata is still the README template, the submission is an enormous notebook/data bundle, and the visible framing suggests a broad exploratory analysis rather than one crisp, well-packaged insight. It is meaningful work, but the presentation/package quality and focus are weaker than the stronger bank-marketing submissions.
